'''Yang Earth Dog''' is the 35th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 戊 Tsuchinoe (yang earth, the gaia-aligned face of autumn), and its branch is 戌 Inu, the [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, both stem and branch share the earth element, doubling its weight in this node.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Fire Rooster]] (node 34) and [[Yin Earth Pig]] (node 36).

== Folk reading ==
Yang Earth Dog is the '''failed-reform year''': the chronicle of doomed top-down restorations, ambitious decrees rolled back within a season by reactionary clans.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]] — yang earth
* '''Branch:''' [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] — yang earth
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' autumn

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Fire Rooster]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Earth Pig]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904922}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
